item.title: 😱 "Hyderabad Ivvandi... Kashmir Teesukondi" Asalu Nijam Enti? | #telugupodcast #rrrshow #geopolitics
item.description:
Did Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel really say, "Give me Hyderabad, take Kashmir"? This statement has been discussed and debated for many years by historians and history enthusiasts. In this video, we explore the historical background, the political situation after India's independence, and what historical records say about this famous quote.
Watch till the end to understand the context behind one of the most talked-about statements in Indian history and separate facts from popular claims.
Raw and Real with Rohith

item.title: 😳 Tashkent Lo Shastri Gariki Em Jarigindhi? | #telugupodcast #rrrshow #rohithgollena #geopolitics
item.description:
How did Lal Bahadur Shastri die? On 11 January 1966, shortly after signing the Tashkent Declaration, India's second Prime Minister passed away in Tashkent. The official cause of death was reported as a heart attack. However, over the years, several questions and alternative theories have led to ongoing public debate.
In this video, we explore the official account, the historical context, and why Shastri's death continues to be one of the most discussed topics in Indian history. This video examines documented information and different viewpoints without promoting unverified claims.
Raw and Real with Rohith

👉 DESCRIPTION:
In this video, we discuss the ongoing Siya Goyal case, other recent similar incidents, and the growing debate around real & toxic feminism.
This video is not against women or feminism. It is about equal accountability, equal justice, and exposing selective outrage on social media.
We have used publicly available information, media reports, and legal perspectives available at the time of making this video. The case is currently under investigation, and the accused are presumed innocent unless proven guilty in a court of law.
Watch till the end and let us know your opinion in the comments.

item.title: 🚨July 31st DEADLINE | What Happens If You Don't File Income Tax Return | ZERO Tax Rules | VR Raja
item.description:
Buy a Term Plan & Get Online Discounts Up to 15%👇 https://tinyurl.com/3tdz3hkj
Buy a Health Plan & Get Online Discounts Up to 25%👇 https://tinyurl.com/3rsn54wj
🚨July 31st DEADLINE | What Happens If You Don't File Income Tax Return | ZERO Tax Rules | VR Raja
ఐటీఆర్ (ITR) ఫైల్ చేయకపోతే జరిగే నష్టాలు ఏంటి? జూలై 31 లోపు రిటర్న్స్ ఎందుకు ఫైల్ చేయాలి, మరియు ఫ్యామిలీకి ఇన్సూరెన్స్ ఎందుకు ముఖ్యం?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, Financial Year 2025-26 ki sambandhinchi Income Tax Returns (ITR) file cheyadam gurinchi detail ga matladukundam. Zero tax unna Nil Return enduku file cheyali? ITR-1 and ITR-2 madhya unna theda enti? Tax planning tho patu Term and Health Insurance mana family ki entha important oo clear ga telusukundam.
In this deep dive into Income Tax filing and Financial Planning, we cover: 🔸 The Power of Zero ITR: Why filing a Nil Return is incredibly crucial for bank loans, foreign visas, and claiming TDS refunds. 🔸 Financial Planning Reality: Understanding the massive difference between mere tax saving and actual wealth protection using Health and Term Insurance. 🔸 New vs Old Regime: The shift to the New Tax Regime as the default for FY 2025-26 and how it impacts your standard deductions. 🔸 The AIS Trap: Why blindly relying only on Form 16 can lead to defective return notices, and how the IT department tracks your high-value transactions. 🔸 Missing the Deadline: The severe financial consequences of missing the July 31st deadline, including heavy penalties, interest, and losing the ability to carry forward losses. 🔸 E-Verification & Refunds: The strict 30-day e-verification rule and how to pre-validate your bank account for a smooth and fast TDS refund.
Mee financial safety ni plan chesukondi, and mee opinion ni kindha comment section lo share cheyandi. Channel ki thappakunda subscribe avvandi!
Disclaimer- This video provides general financial awareness and educational information regarding Income Tax Returns and financial planning. It does not constitute professional financial or legal advice. Please consult a certified CA or financial advisor for personalized tax planning. Some contents are used for educational purpose under fair use. Copyright disclaimer Under Section 107 of the Copyright Act 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, and research. Non-profit, educational or personal use tips the balance in favor of fair use.

item.title: ‼️⚠️ NOT FOR THE WEAK HEARTED! | Ft. IPS Mahesh Muralidhar Bhagwat | TELUGU PODCAST | RAW TALKS
item.description:
What does it really take to uphold law and order in a country as diverse and complex as India?
In this episode of Raw Talks, VK sat down with Mahesh Muralidhar Bhagwath, Director General of Police (Law & Order), for an insightful conversation on crime, justice, policing, leadership, and public service.
In this episode, we discuss:
- The untold stories behind the Manipur insurgency and landmark investigations. - The Hajipur Triple Murder Case and how it changed policing. - Black magic investigations, human sacrifice cases, and forensic breakthroughs. - Human trafficking, organ trafficking, bonded labour, and child rescue operations. - Policing during COVID-19 and the challenges officers faced on the frontlines. - Media trials, sensationalism, and whether newspapers are still serving their true purpose. - Why trust between the public and the police is still a work in progress. - Political pressure, transfers, and maintaining integrity in public service. - His UPSC journey, mentorship, and advice for aspirants. - Memorable encounters with criminals, life-threatening experiences, and lessons that shaped his career.
If you're interested in policing, governance, public policy, or real-life crime investigations, this conversation offers a rare perspective from someone who has spent decades serving on the frontlines. . Disclaimer: This video is for educational purposes only. The opinions expressed by the guests are their personal views and do not reflect our stance. We have no intention of defaming or harming any individual, brand, product, country, or profession mentioned in this video. Our aim is to provide information to help the audience make informed decisions. ~
00:00:00 Introduction 00:03:24 Hajipur Triple Murder Case Investigation 00:13:12 Intimidating Atmosphere of the Courtroom 00:14:30 Uppal Narabali Black Magic Ritual Killing 00:19:24 Adilabad Tantric Case 00:21:21 Yadagirigutta Rituals: Belief vs Exploitation 00:22:32 Media Trial Cases and Justice Under Pressure 00:25:35 Role of Newspapers in Shaping Public Narrative 00:27:33 Types of Human Trafficking Explained 00:30:22 Cyber-Enabled Trafficking Targeting IT Professionals 00:33:13 Kidney Trafficking Racket Exposed 00:35:48 Raidurg Resort Trafficking Rescue Operation 00:38:09 Yadagirigutta Brothels Child Trafficking Bust 00:43:27 Dubai Trafficking Case 00:45:59 Rescuing 30-40 Trafficked Children 00:48:09 How the Human Trafficking Nexus Operates 00:51:28 Parents Selling Their Own Children 00:53:54 Aadhaar Card Used to Identify a Trafficked Girl Child 00:55:28 Jogini System: Bride Selling in India 01:01:03 Suspending Police Officers and Internal Politics 01:02:11 Reformed Naxalites and Stories of Redemption 01:06:49 Policing During the Covid-19 Pandemic 01:10:15 The Ambulance Business Racket 01:12:33 Cost of Oxygen Cylinders During Covid 01:15:14 Facing Life Threats as a Police Officer 01:18:25 Managing Frequent Police Transfers 01:22:13 A Narrow Escape in the Old City 01:26:28 Kidnapping Disguised as Marriage 01:29:35 Honorary Commissioner Designation for Cancer Patients 01:32:02 Promoting Siraj to DSP 01:33:00 Eluru Cold Cases Solved Through Citizens' Letters 01:40:53 Fake Currency Note Cases 01:43:53 An Unforgettable Conversation With a Criminal 01:45:24 UPSC Mentorship Journey 01:52:57 A Mentorship Success Story: Restoring Trust in the Process 01:56:20 Advice for Aspiring Officers and the Youth

item.title: 🔥 Unknown facts of Subhash Chandra Bose? | #telugupodcast #rrrshow #geopolitics
item.description:
Did Subhas Chandra Bose play a major role in India's freedom struggle? 🇮🇳 In this video, we explore the powerful journey of Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose, the formation of the Indian National Army (INA), and how his actions influenced the British Empire during the final years of colonial rule.
From inspiring thousands of Indians to challenging British authority, Netaji's leadership became an important chapter in India's independence movement. Historians continue to debate how much his efforts influenced the British decision to leave India, making this one of the most fascinating topics in Indian history.
Watch till the end to learn more about the life, courage, and legacy of one of India's greatest freedom fighters.
Raw and Real with Rohith

item.title: Is Swarga Really Luxurious? The Secret of Hinduism’s 14 Lokas
item.description:
Most people think Hinduism speaks only about Swarga and Naraka. Heaven and hell. But Sanatana Dharma describes something far more vast. Our scriptures speak of 14 Lokas. Seven higher realms. Seven lower realms. And in the middle is Bhuloka, the world we live in.
#14lokas #heaven #hinduism #cosmology
But here is the surprising part.
Swarga is not the final goal. It is a higher loka, yes. A place of punya, beauty, and divine enjoyment. But it is still temporary.
Patala is not simply hell. It is described as a mysterious realm connected with Nagas, hidden wealth, and worlds beneath human perception.
And Bhuloka is not ordinary. It is Karma Bhumi. The place where choices matter. The place where dharma can be followed. The place where a jeeva can rise, fall, transform, and seek moksha.
In this video, we explore the deeper meaning of the Chaturdasha Lokas, from Atala and Patala to Swarga, Mahar, Jana, Tapa, and Satyaloka, and why Hindu cosmology is not just about places above and below Earth, but about karma, consciousness, rebirth, and liberation.
The real question is not just where these lokas are.
The real question is: If even Swarga is temporary, what is the true goal of human life?
Download the Temple Girl Kids app at templegirl.com for bedtime stories from India’s temples and tradition.
Chapters: 00:00 What if Swarga is not the final goal? 01:10 What are the 14 Lokas? 02:30 Seven higher and seven lower realms 04:00 Why Patala is not simply hell 06:30 The mystery of the Naga realms 08:30 What Swarga Loka really means 10:30 Why Swarga is temporary 12:00 Why Bhuloka is Karma Bhumi 14:00 Why human birth is considered rare 15:30 Moksha: beyond all lokas

item.title: 🚨China Warning to India | Chanakya & Sanskrit Belong to Pakistan? | Indus Water Treaty | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨China Warning to India | Chanakya & Sanskrit Belong to Pakistan? | Indus Water Treaty | VR Raja
చాణక్యుడు పాకిస్తానీయా? సంస్కృతం పుట్టింది అక్కడేనా? సింధు జలాల కోసం పాకిస్తాన్ ఆడుతున్న కొత్త నాటకం వెనుక ఉన్న అసలు నిజాలు!
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, Pakistan kothaga modalupettina "The Great Pakistan Comedy Show" gurinchi detail ga matladukundam. Chanakya, Panini lanti ancient Indian scholars ni Pakistan valla heritage ga enduku claim chesukuntundi? Deeni venuka unna Indus Water Treaty crisis enti?
In this deep dive into the recent geopolitical drama and identity crisis of Pakistan, we cover: 🔸 The Fake Claims: Why Pakistan is suddenly claiming Sanskrit, Panini, and Chanakya as their own heritage. 🔸 The Identity Crisis: The hypocrisy of a nation built on the Two-Nation Theory now trying to own the ancient Indus Valley Civilization. 🔸 The Real Motive - Water: How India's strong stance on the Indus Waters Treaty and the diversion of the Ravi river pushed Pakistan into a panic. 🔸 Global Rejections: How the World Bank, UN, and International Courts responded to Pakistan's desperate appeals regarding water sharing. 🔸 The Cultural Irony: The failed attempts to rename Lahore streets to their pre-partition Hindu names and the backlash from local radical groups.
Join us as we decode the shifting dynamics of global politics and expose the truth behind this new civilizational propaganda.
#VRRaja #Geopolitics #IndusWaterTreaty #IndianHistory #PakistanCrisis #telugufacts

item.title: 🚨BIG TWIST in in Pune Tragedy | Siya Lawyer vs Brother | 1 CRORE Rupees & LAST 34 Minutes | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨BIG TWIST in in Pune Tragedy | Siya Lawyer vs Brother | 1 CRORE Rupees & LAST 34 Minutes | VR Raja
పూణే లోహగడ్ ఫోర్ట్ ఘటనలో ఊహించని మలుపులు: కోటి రూపాయల కుట్ర, 34 నిమిషాల ముందు సీక్రెట్ కాల్, మరియు రంగంలోకి దిగిన స్పెషల్ ప్రాసిక్యూటర్ ఉజ్వల్ నికమ్!
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, Pune incident ki sambandhinchi bayatapaddaa latest mind-blowing twists gurinchi detail ga matladukundam. Siya tana pelli shopping kosam Ketan nundi theesukunna 1 Crore rupees Chetan ki enduku ichindi? Asalu tragedy jargadaniki 34 minutes mundu aa phone call lo em matladukunnaru?
In this deep dive into the recent updates of the complex Pune case, we cover: 🔸 The 1 Crore Conspiracy: How financial motives and a 3-year settlement plan played a massive role in this tragic incident. 🔸 Digital Footprints: The recovery of deleted WhatsApp chats, 2004 call records, and the crucial final call made just 34 minutes before the event. 🔸 The Pre-Decided Signal: How a simple act of sitting down to tie a shoelace was used as a terrifying coordination signal. 🔸 Scientific Investigation: The use of Dummy Reconstruction at the crime scene and Gait Analysis to scientifically prove the presence of the accused. 🔸 The Bizarre Motive: Analyzing the absurd excuse of a 'wig and stammer' used by the accused to justify their actions. 🔸 The Legal Drama: The entry of legendary prosecutor Ujjwal Nikam, the fake lawyer controversy, and the 10 Crore defamation suit.
Mee opinion ni kindha comment section lo share cheyandi and channel ki thappakunda subscribe avvandi!
#VRRaja #PuneIncident #JusticeForKetan #LohagadFort #UjjwalNikam #telugufactschannel

item.title: How Instagram Posts Go VIRAL
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: How Instagram Posts Go VIRAL
In this short, I’ll break down exactly how Instagram handles massive scale in step-by-step way so you don’t get overwhelmed.
I’ve covered how a combination of smart system design decisions working together in the backend, like how edge servers pulling data in milliseconds, how object storage creates multiple versions of same media for different devices, how machine learning models tests engagement in real-time and more.
It’s not just theory for interviews, it’s what makes real-world systems reliable at scale.
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

item.description:
🚨Europe Heat Waves Explained Melting Traffic Lights | Fake Videos EXPOSED & Global WARNING | VR Raja
ఎప్పుడూ మంచుతో ఉండే యూరోప్ ఇప్పుడు నిప్పుల కొలిమిలా ఎందుకు మారింది? ట్రాఫిక్ లైట్స్, రైల్వే ట్రాక్స్ నిజంగానే కరిగిపోతున్నాయా?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, Europe ni shake chestunna extreme heatwaves gurinchi, social media lo viral avuthunna fake videos gurinchi detail ga matladukundam. India lo 43 degrees and Europe lo 43 degrees oke la enduku undavu? Asalu Omega Block and Heat Dome ante enti?
In this deep dive into the massive climate shift and the reality of the European heatwave, we cover: 🔸 Fake Videos Exposed: The truth behind the viral clips of melting traffic lights in Italy and Germany. 🔸 The Real Destruction: Authentic reports of melting tram tracks in Germany and devastating fires in Croatia and Eastern Europe. 🔸 The Science of the Heat Dome: Understanding the "Omega Block" and how trapped hot air is turning cities into furnaces. 🔸 India vs Europe at 43°C: The three main reasons (Acclimatization, Humidity, Night-time cooling) why Europeans are struggling with temperatures Indians handle regularly. 🔸 Infrastructure Flaws: Why traditional European houses, built to trap heat for winters, are now acting as ovens, and why only 20% of homes have ACs. 🔸 A Global Warning: Why this climate crisis is a wake-up call for everyone, including India, and the urgent need to rethink urban development.

item.description:
🚨 BREAKING Bangladesh HINDUS on the Streets | VIRAL Fake Video Exposed & Unknown Men | VR Raja
బంగ్లాదేశ్ లో హిందువులు ఎందుకు రోడ్ల మీదకి వచ్చారు? పాకిస్తాన్ లో రాలిపోతున్న టాప్ మాస్టర్ మైండ్స్ వెనుక ఉన్న ఆ సీక్రెట్ ఏంటి?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, Bangladesh lo jarugutunna massive Hindu protests gurinchi and social media lo viral avuthunna oka fake news video gurinchi detail ga matladukundam. Gaibandha district lo Ramu di vigraham construction aapinchadam venuka unna conspiracies enti? Alage, last 2 months lo Pakistan lo top masterminds ni eliminate chesina "Unknown Men" operations gurinchi deep ga analyse cheddam.
In this deep dive into the recent geopolitical chaos and secret operations, we cover: 🔸 The Gaibandha Controversy: How a local temple project to build an 81-foot Ram statue in Bangladesh turned into a massive geopolitical and religious issue. 🔸 The 72-Hour Ultimatum: The historic moment when Bangladeshi Hindus took to the streets with torchlight processions, fighting back against the disrespect shown to their beliefs. 🔸 Exposing the Fake News: The truth behind the viral video claiming the mysterious end of Hassan Shahadat, and why fact-checking is crucial in geopolitics. 🔸 The "Unknown Men" Strikes: A detailed breakdown of how three major masterminds (Hamza Burhan, Sheikh Yousuf Afridi, and Maulana Salman Azhar) were eliminated in Pakistan within a span of just two months. 🔸 India's Strategic Silence: How the sudden elimination of these key figures in Pulwama and 26/11 conspiracies is sending shockwaves through terrorist networks.
Join us as we decode the shifting dynamics of global geopolitics and the profound impact of these recent events.
#VRRaja #BangladeshHindus #UnknownMen #Geopolitics #PakistanNews #TeluguFacts

item.title: CI/CD CRASH COURSE For Beginners | Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab
item.description:
In this video, I will break down how CI/CD workflows actually work in modern software and cloud environments so you can understand how code moves from development into production systems.
I have covered Continuous Integration, Continuous Delivery vs Continuous Deployment, pipeline stages, testing workflows, container registries, how modern CI/CD systems automate software delivery, and more. I’ve also covered how tools like Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and GitLab CI work, their tradeoffs, how pipelines are structured in real-world projects, and how AI-powered platforms like Harness AI are changing modern DevOps workflows.
If you’re preparing for high-paying jobs like DevOps engineer, cloud engineer, site reliability engineer, or platform engineer, this video is for you.
Leave a like, comment and subscribe for more!
CHAPTERS 00:00 Intro 00:57 What is Continuous Integration? 01:24 What is Continuous Delivery? 01:37 What is Continuous Deployment? 02:27 CI/CD Workflow 04:17 Jenkins 05:33 Github Actions 07:00 GitLab CI 08:23 Harness AI 08:56 Takeaways 09:34 Outro

item.title: 🚨Generative AI vs AGENTIC AI | The Future of Autonomous AI Explained | Software Jobs | VR Raja
item.description:

🚨Generative AI vs AGENTIC AI | The Future of Autonomous AI Explained | Software Jobs | VR Raja
రాబోయే 'ఏజెంటిక్ AI' యుగంలో మీ సాఫ్ట్‌వేర్ ఉద్యోగం సేఫేనా? టెక్ ప్రపంచాన్ని శాసించబోయే అటానమస్ సిస్టమ్స్!
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, tech prapanchanni mottham marchabothunna kotha revolution "Agentic AI" gurinchi detail ga matladukundam. Generative AI ki, Agentic AI ki theda enti? Devin AI lanti autonomous systems valla software engineers jobs potaya? Leka AI managers ga kotha demand vasthunda?
In this deep dive into the future of Artificial Intelligence and technology jobs, we cover: 🔸 Generative vs Agentic AI: The massive shift from basic prompt-answering bots to autonomous systems that think and execute complex tasks on their own. 🔸 Agentic Swarms & Multi-Agent Systems: How virtual AI teams (Coders, Reviewers, Security Agents) communicate and work together to build software with zero human intervention. 🔸 The One-Person Unicorn: The unbelievable future where a single entrepreneur can run a billion-dollar company managing marketing, tech, and sales purely through AI agents. 🔸 Future of Software Engineers: Why basic coding jobs will vanish, but the demand for "AI Orchestrators" and "AI Managers" will skyrocket. 🔸 The Education System Reality: Why 99% of traditional engineering colleges are failing with outdated 1995 syllabuses, leaving 80% of graduates unplaced. 🔸 The Scaler School of Technology (SST): How this Silicon Valley-style college in Bangalore is changing the game with 100+ industry leaders, real-world AI projects, and massive placements.
Meeru ee Agentic AI revolution ki ready ga unnara? Mee opinion ni kindha comment section lo share cheyandi and channel ki thappakunda subscribe avvandi!

item.description:

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬
►►► This video ◄◄◄

item.title: Night Sky
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Night Sky.

Night Sky centers around Franklin and Irene York, a couple who years ago discovered a chamber buried in their backyard which inexplicably leads to a strange, deserted planet. They've carefully guarded their secret ever since, but when an enigmatic young man enters their lives, the Yorks' quiet existence is quickly upended, and the mysterious chamber they thought they knew so well turns out to be much more than they could ever have imagined.

item.title: MASTER DevOps + AI Before 2026 Ends
item.description:
Guide+Bootcamp: https://gdrive.openinapp.co/05e6h
Half of 2026 is already over, and if you want to become a DevOps Engineer or an AI Engineer in 2026, there is still enough time, 192 days to be exact, to completely change your career trajectory.
And these two free hands-on bootcamps by KodeKloud are some of the best structured resources that I found really valuable.
Across the next 200 days, you’ll cover concepts like:
→ Linux & server administration → Git & version control → Docker & containers → Kubernetes & orchestration → CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins → Python environments & packaging → DVC & MLflow → Training workflows & fine-tuning → GPU deployments & model serving → FastAPI, Kubeflow, KServe & GitOps → Monitoring, deployment strategies & production AI workflows
And honestly, you don’t need to master everything.
You just need enough practical skills to: → build projects → understand workflows → and complete the final capstone projects properly
That’s where the real learning happens.

బ్రిటన్ ప్రధాని కేయిర్ స్టార్మర్ సంచలన రాజీనామా వెనుక ఉన్న అసలు కారణాలు ఏంటి? 2 ఏళ్లలోనే భారీ మెజారిటీ ఎలా ఆవిరైపోయింది?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, United Kingdom lo jarugutunna massive political earthquake gurinchi detail ga matladukundam. Just 2 years lo Keir Starmer power ela collapse ayyindi? Own party MPs WhatsApp dwara ela pressure thecharu? Asalu Britain economy enduku antha ghoranga padipoyindi? While neighboring European countries are adapting to new political landscapes and finding fresh stability, the UK is setting records for changing its leaders.
In this deep dive into the recent UK political crisis, we cover: 🔸 The Loveless Landslide: How Keir Starmer's huge majority in 2024 was actually a very weak mandate built on anti-incumbency. 🔸 WhatsApp Rebellions: The secret backbench plots and the modern "Curry House" style politics forcing leaders out. 🔸 Economic Crisis: The dark reality of Britain's economy, rising national debt, and the heavy tax burden on citizens. 🔸 The Epstein Connection: The controversial appointment of Peter Mandelson and how it damaged the government's reputation. 🔸 Minority Shift: Why the Labour party lost its strongest Muslim vote bank over domestic and international policies. 🔸 The Rise of Reform UK: How Nigel Farage's party is changing the traditional two-party system in Britain.
Join us as we decode the shifting dynamics of global politics and the profound impact of Britain's ongoing instability.

item.title: Vasuki the Serpent King: The Real Story Behind Shiva’s Snake | Ultimate Secrets
item.description:
Vasuki the Serpent King: The Real Story Behind Shiva’s Snake | Ultimate Secrets. #shiva #snake #vasuki #mahabharat #sheshnath #krishna #hindugod #hindumythology #mahakal #history #facts Most people know Vasuki as the serpent used as a rope during Samudra Manthan.
But that is only one part of his story.
Vasuki was not just a snake. He was the king of the Sarpas. The serpent with a blazing Nagamani. The ruler of Naglok. The one who endured the pain of Samudra Manthan so the universe could receive Amrit.
And then came the moment that changed everything.
When Halahala, the deadliest poison in the universe, emerged from the ocean, everyone ran. But Shiva stepped forward and drank it. Vasuki watched this moment while still wrapped around Mandara mountain.
That one act of Mahadev changed Vasuki forever.
After this, Vasuki performed intense tapasya for Shiva. And when Shiva appeared before him and asked him what he wanted, Vasuki did not ask for power, revenge, wealth, or protection.
He asked only one thing.
To stay near Shiva forever.
That is why the serpent you see around Shiva’s neck is Vasuki.
But Vasuki’s story does not end there. His own mother Kadru’s curse nearly destroyed the entire Naga race. The Sarpa Satra of King Janamejaya almost wiped out every serpent in existence. And the one who saved them was Astika, the young sage whose arrival had been foretold by Brahma himself.
In this episode, we explore the complete story of Vasuki from the Mahabharata, Bhagavata Purana, Skanda Purana, Linga Purana, and Bhagavad Gita.
This is the untold story of Vasuki, the Serpent King Shiva chose to wear around his neck.
Watch till the end. After this, you will never look at the snake on Shiva’s neck the same way again.
Subscribe to Temple Girl for more stories from India’s temples, Puranas, and sacred traditions.
For children’s bedtime stories from India’s temples, download the Temple Girl Kids app at templegirl.com
Jai Mahadev. Jai Nagaraj.

item.title: Mystery of Ambubachi Mela , Every June, This Temple’s Water Turns Red
item.description: Every year, during the Ambubachi Mela at Kamakhya Temple in Assam, a sacred underground spring is believed to turn red. This powerful ritual is connected to Maa Kamakhya and symbolizes the divine feminine and fertility in Shakti tradition. In this short, discover the mystery, belief, and spiritual significance behind one of India’s most fascinating temple traditions. #KamakhyaTemple #AmbubachiMela #Hinduism #Mystery #TempleFacts #Assam #SanatanDharma #Shorts

item.title: DevOps + LLM +AI Project w/ Docker, Kubernetes, vLLM | Resume Project for Beginners
item.description:
Project Guide + Slides: https://github.com/vishakhasadhwani/llm-deployment-demo/tree/main/visual-walkthrough-prompt-guide
One of the coolest part of this workflow was using Gamma for the slides: check it out here: https://gamma.1stcollab.com/vishakha.sadhwani_yt
In this video, I will walk you through how to deploy a local LLM chat application on a cloud-based GPU instance using real AI infrastructure components.
I’ve covered the complete deployment architecture, how inference engines like vLLM work, GPU-based model serving, Docker containerization, Nvidia container toolkit setup, Streamlit UI integration, and how the full request flow works from browser → frontend → inference server → GPU.
You will also learn how production-style LLM deployment patterns work, how AI models are packaged and exposed through APIs, and why tools like vLLM are becoming critical in modern AI infrastructure workflows.
This video is ideal for AI engineers, DevOps engineers, cloud engineers, MLOps learners, and anyone trying to understand how large language models are actually deployed in production environments.

item.title: Paper Girls
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Paper Girls.

Paper Girls follows four young girls who, while out delivering papers on the morning after Halloween in 1988, become unwittingly caught in a conflict between warring factions of time-travelers, sending them on an adventure through time that will save the world. As they travel between our present, the past, and the future — they encounter future versions of themselves and now must choose to embrace or reject their fate. An emotional adventure in which the girls and the women they eventually become are tough, their friendships are authentic, and their journey through time is epic.

item.title: Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed.

Paula, a newly divorced mom, falls down a dangerous rabbit hole of blackmail, murder, and youth soccer.

Convinced she witnessed a crime — while simultaneously struggling through a custody battle and an identity crisis — Paula begins her own investigation, one that could unravel a greater conspiracy while also holding the keys to rebuilding her family and sense of self.

item.title: Drops of God
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Drops of God.

Drops of God is set in the world of gastronomy and fine wines, which are in mourning as Alexandre Léger, creator of the famous Léger Wine Guide and emblematic figure in oenology, has just passed away at his home in Tokyo at the age of 60. He left behind a daughter, Camille, who lives in Paris and hasn't seen her father since her parents separated when she was nine years old. When Camille flies to Tokyo and Léger's will is read, she discovers that her father has left her an extraordinary wine collection – the greatest collection in the world according to the experts. But, to claim the inheritance, Camille must compete with a brilliant young oenologist, Issei Tomine, who her father took under his wing and is referred to in Léger's will as his "spiritual son." But is his connection to Issei only spiritual?

item.title: Cape Fear
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Cape Fear.

A storm is coming for happily married attorneys Anna and Tom Bowden when Max Cady, the notorious killer they are responsible for putting behind bars, is let out of prison - and he wants vengeance.

item.title: R.J. Decker
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: R.J. Decker.

R.J. Decker centers on the eponymous R.J. Decker, a disgraced newspaper photographer and ex-con who starts over as a private investigator in the colorful-if-crime-filled world of South Florida, tackling cases that range from slightly odd to outright bizarre with the help of his journalist ex, her police detective wife, and a shadowy new benefactor, a woman from his past who could be his greatest ally... or his one-way ticket back to prison.

item.title: Star City
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star City.

Star City is a propulsive, paranoid thriller that takes us back to the key moment in the alt-history retelling of the space race — when the Soviet Union became the first nation to put a man on the moon. But this time, we explore the story from behind the Iron Curtain, showing the lives of the cosmonauts, the engineers and the intelligence officers embedded among them in the Soviet space program, and the risks they all took to propel humanity forward.

item.title: Kamakhya Temple - the place where periods are sacred. #kamakhyatemple #ambubachimela
Kamakhya Temple Mystery: Why It Closes for 3 Days Every Year | Ambubachi Mela
item.description:
If you want your children to grow up knowing the stories of Devi and her Shakti — the stories that temples like Kamakhya have kept alive for centuries — we built Temple Girl Kids exactly for that. Download it at www.templegirl.com
Kamakhya is one of the most mysterious temples in Bharat.
Most temples have a murti inside the garbhagriha. But at Kamakhya, you descend into a natural cave beneath the temple, where a yoni shaped rock is worshipped as Maa Kamakhya herself. An underground spring flows over it throughout the year.
Once every year, during Ambubachi Mela, the temple closes for three days.
Devotees believe this is when Maa Kamakhya goes through her annual cycle. The spring is believed to turn red, the temple remains closed, and when it reopens, thousands of devotees wait for Angabastra, the red cloth that was placed over the yoni peetha during those three days.
But Kamakhya is not only about Ambubachi Mela.
Nilachal Hill is one of the most important centres of Shakti worship in Bharat. It is connected to the ten Mahavidyas, to Tantric sadhana, to the story of Narakasura, and to the Koch kings who rebuilt the temple in the 16th century.
There is also a story that the very kings who rebuilt Kamakhya were later cursed by the Devi, and that their descendants still avoid looking at Nilachal Hill even today.
In this video, we explore the many layers of Kamakhya Temple: why there is no murti inside, why the temple closes every June, why the red cloth prasad is considered so powerful, and what Ambubachi Mela reveals about the way Bharat once understood menstruation, fertility, and the power of Devi.
Download the Temple Girl Kids app at templegirl.com for bedtime stories from India’s temples, made for children.
Subscribe to Temple Girl for more stories from Bharat’s living temple traditions.
Jai Maa Kamakhya.
#kamakhyatemple #ambubachimela #kamakhyasecrets

item.title: Mango Farmer Story | Final Decision | Dubai | India GDP | Youngsters | Dr. Ravikanth Kongara
item.description:
Mango Farmer Story | Final Decision | Dubai | India GDP | Youngsters | Dr. Ravikanth Kongara --*****-- గత 12 సంవత్సరాలుగా రెండు తెలుగు రాష్ట్రాల ప్రజలకి అత్యాధునిక ప్రమాణాలతో సరికొత్త ఆధునిక వైద్య సేవలని డాక్టర్ కొంగర రవికాంత్ గారు అందిస్తున్నారు. విజయవాడలోని వారి కర్పోరేట్ స్థాయి హాస్పటల్లో తమ విశేష అనుభవంతో సామాన్యులకి కూడా అందుబాటులో ఉండే నాణ్యమైన వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తూ గొప్ప పేరు సాదించారు.
అన్ని రకాల గ్యాస్ట్రో, బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీ, లాపరోస్కోపీ సమస్యలకి చికిత్స అందిస్తూ దక్షిణ భారతదేశంలోనే నెలకు అత్యధిక బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీలు చేస్తు గొప్ప ఫలితాలు సాదించారు. అంతేగాక 200 నుండి 250 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న అత్యంత ప్రమాదకర బేరియాట్రిక్ సమస్యకి శస్త్రచికిత్స చేసి అసాధ్యాన్ని సుసాధ్యం చేసారు. సుమారు 200 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న సూపర్ ఒబేసిటీ పేషెంట్లు మంచి ఫలితాలని పొందారు.
విజయవాడలో మొట్ట మొదటిసారిగా విదేశి తరహాలో అత్యాధునిక సౌకర్యాలతో 24 గంటలు వైద్యుల పర్యావేక్షణలో వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తున్నారు. 100 పడకలతో పాటు అత్యవసర సమయంలో ఆంబులెన్స్ సౌకర్యం కలదు.

item.title: FAANG Is Dead, MANGOS Is Here!
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: FAANG Is Dead, MANGOS Is Here!
Resources: https://gdrive.openinapp.co/tzn7d
FAANG is no longer the dream among tech aspirants; MANGOS is the new thing.
There is a new acronym in the tech industry with all recent and upcoming companies that are hiring, MANGOS.
M - Meta A - Anthropic N - NVIDIA G - Google O - OpenAI S - SpaceX
I’ve covered the 7 skills that you must build to get into these top tech companies.
You don’t need to master all of these skills immediately; getting strong in even 4 areas can increase your chances of cracking them.
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.

item.title: Prabhas Kidnapped 😱 for RISK
6 AI LLM Concepts EXPLAINED In 2 MINUTES!
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: 6 AI LLM Concepts EXPLAINED In 2 MINUTES!
AI System Design interviews today assume that you already understand how LLM systems work underneath.
These concepts alone explain most of how modern LLM systems, like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more, actually operate.
• Tokens → Convert text into model-readable units • Context Window → Controls how much information the model can process • Embeddings → Represent meaning mathematically • System Prompts → Define the model’s hidden behavior and rules • Temperature → Controls response randomness and creativity • RAG → Injects external knowledge into the workflow
Once these concepts start connecting together as one system instead of isolated definitions, modern LLM architectures become much easier to reason about.
Leave a like, share, and subscribe for more such breakdowns!

item.title: Why are all Gods born only in India?
The Secret of Bharatavarsha: Why Even Gods Desire Human Birth Here
item.description:
Why is Bharatavarsha considered so special in the Puranas? Most people answer this with simple lines like “India is pavitra bhoomi.” But the Puranas give a much deeper answer. They speak of different worlds, heavenly realms, karma, moksha, and the rare opportunity of human birth. And in that explanation, Bharatavarsha is not described as just another land. It is described as the place where karma truly matters, where dharma can be followed, and where moksha can be attained. This video explores the forgotten Puranic idea behind Bharatavarsha, why even Devas are said to desire human birth here, and why human life on this land is considered such a rare opportunity. If you have ever wondered why so many avataras, temples, rishis, and sacred stories are connected to Bharatavarsha, this video will give you a completely different way to look at it.
Watch till the end.
Subscribe to Temple Girl for more stories from India’s temples, Puranas, and dharmic traditions.
#India #bharat #Hinduism #Puranas #Moksha #Karma #TempleGirl #IndianTemples #SanatanaDharma

item.title: DevOps Engineer SALARY 2026 [5 Levels]
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: DevOps Engineer SALARY 2026 [5 Levels]
The deeper I got into DevOps and AI infrastructure, the more I realized career growth changes completely at higher levels.
The progression usually looks like this:
• Explorers → Learning Linux, Docker, Cloud, and Kubernetes basics → Experimenting, building foundations, understanding workflows → Salary range: $0 – $50k
• Deployers → Shipping systems in production → Working with CI/CD, Terraform, Kubernetes, Jenkins, GitOps → Salary range: $90k – $150k
• System Engineers → Thinking beyond YAML files → Designing observability, scalability, networking, and monitoring systems → Starting to work with AIOps and production infrastructure → Salary range: $150k – $250k
• Platform Engineers → Building internal platforms and scalable infrastructure → Improving reliability, developer productivity, GPU workloads, and automation → Salary range: $250k – $400k+
• Architects / Infrastructure AI Engineers/ Forward Deployed Engineers. → Solving large-scale distributed systems problems → Designing scalable AI infrastructure and production architectures → Salary range: $400k – $1M+
So, the higher you go, it becomes less about memorizing tools and more about architecture, scalability, trade-offs, infrastructure behavior, and systems thinking.
Leave a like, comment, and subscribe for more!

COMPLETE APIs Crash Course In 14 Minutes [w/ FREE Project] | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
In this video, I’ll break down APIs from scratch so you can understand how modern software systems, cloud platforms, and AI applications actually communicate behind the scenes.
I’ve covered how APIs work, different API architecture patterns, infrastructure layers, trade-offs, and how APIs power modern AI applications. I also explained core API concepts and communication patterns like REST APIs, GraphQL, SOAP, gRPC, WebSockets, and Webhooks, along with JWT authentication, API gateways, monitoring, AI integrations, MCP, Flask, FastAPI, and production-grade API infrastructure using practical real-world examples.
Whether you're preparing for backend, DevOps, AI engineering, or system design interviews, understanding APIs is one of the most important skills you can build as an engineer.
Leave a like, comment, and subscribe for more!

item.title: No Data, No AI – Why Data Analytics Matters | Live Session 2
item.description:
Welcome to Session 2 of our Data Analytics Demo! 🚀
If you missed our first session, don't worry—you're jumping in at the perfect time. In this stream, we are tackling a fundamental truth in the modern tech landscape: AI is only as good as the data it trains on. Without robust data analytics, even the most advanced Artificial Intelligence algorithms are virtually useless.
Today, we break down exactly why data analytics serves as the critical foundation for AI success.
📌 What We’ll Cover Today: The Data-AI Connection: Why AI completely relies on high-quality data infrastructure.
Garbage In, Garbage Out: How poor data quality breaks AI models and leads to flawed business insights.
The Role of Data Analytics: How parsing, cleaning, and analyzing data prepares it to power intelligent automation.
Live Walkthrough/Examples: Real-world scenarios demonstrating data analytics driving successful AI implementations.
Whether you are an aspiring data scientist, a business leader looking to implement AI, or just curious about the future of tech, this session will give you a clear roadmap of how data and AI work hand-in-hand.

item.title: No Data, No AI – Why Data Analytics Matters | Live Session
item.description:
Welcome to the live session! 🚀
Artificial Intelligence is changing the world, but AI is only as good as the data feeding it. In this session, we break down why Data Analytics is the absolute foundation of modern AI systems. Without clean, structured, and well-analyzed data, even the most advanced AI models fall flat.
What we’ll cover:
Why data is the true "fuel" for AI and Machine Learning.
The critical role of a Data Analyst in an AI-driven industry.
Real-world examples of data failures leading to AI failures.
Q&A session – bring your questions!
📌 Don't forget to like, subscribe, and turn on notifications to stay updated with future live sessions and tech deep-dives!
#DataAnalytics #ArtificialIntelligence #MachineLearning #TechLive #BigData

item.title: Kubernetes For AI: Zero To Hero | ULTIMATE Crash Course For Beginners | Part 2
item.description:
Watch Part 1: youtube.com/watch?v=H_a5DTKSEjY
This is part 2 of my Kubernetes for AI crash course series, where I’ll walk you through how Kubernetes powers modern AI infrastructure and production AI workloads.
I’ve covered how Kubernetes is extended using CRDs and operators, how GPU scheduling works, distributed AI training with Kubeflow, MLflow, and Ray, inference serving with KServe and vLLM, autoscaling AI workloads using KEDA, and building a production-grade observability stack with Prometheus and Grafana.
Watch till the end to understand Kubernetes concepts with real-world AI deployment patterns and modern LLM production systems.
Leave a like, comment, and subscribe for more!
CHAPTERS: 00:00​ Intro 01:58​ Bucket 1 05:27 Bucket 2 07:18 Bucket 3 12:09 Bucket 4 14:31 Bucket 5 16:05 Bucket 6 17:52 Conclusion

🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

item.title: Peddi Climax be like
MUST-KNOW Cloud DevOps Interview Concepts
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: MUST-KNOW Cloud DevOps Interview Concepts
I’ve seen that many beginners learning cloud & DevOps often mix up similar-sounding concepts in interviews.
Here’s the simplest explanation of the most important concepts that are often asked repeatedly.
• Docker vs Kubernetes → Docker packages applications → Kubernetes manages and scales them
• Container vs Pod → Containers run applications → Pods group containers inside Kubernetes
• CI vs CD → CI tests and builds code → CD deploys it to production
• Horizontal vs Vertical Scaling → Horizontal adds more servers → Vertical increases server power
• REST vs gRPC → REST works great for web APIs → gRPC is optimized for backend communication
• Terraform vs Ansible → Terraform creates infrastructure → Ansible configures software
• Logging vs Monitoring → Logging tracks events → Monitoring tracks system health
• Stateless vs Stateful Apps → Stateless apps don’t remember requests → Stateful apps store session/data history
Watch till the end to know about more important concepts!
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/

I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.

item.title: Movie Review: 'Masters of the Universe’ (2026)
item.description: Opening in theaters on June 5th is ‘Masters of the Universe’, which is the second live-action film based on Mattel’s popular toy line and was directed by Travis Knight (‘Bumblebee’).The new film stars Nicholas Galitzine (‘The Sheep Detectives’) as Prince Adam / He-Man, Camila Mendes (‘Palm Springs’) as Teela, Idris Elba (‘Pacific Rim’) as Man-At-Arms, Morena Baccarin (‘Deadpool’) as the Sorceress, Alison Brie (‘Together’) as Evil-Lyn, Jared Leto (‘Morbius’) as Skeletor, and Kristen Wiig (‘Wonder Woman 1984’) as the voice of Roboto.

item.title: Spider-Noir
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Spider-Noir.

Spider-Noir tells the story of Ben Reilly, a seasoned, down on his luck private investigator in 1930s New York, who is forced to grapple with his past life, following a deeply personal tragedy, as the city's one and only superhero.

item.title: Ponies
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Ponies.

Moscow, 1977. Two "PONIES" ("persons of no interest" in intelligence speak) work anonymously as secretaries in the American Embassy. That is until their husbands are killed under mysterious circumstances in the USSR, and the pair become CIA operatives. Bea is an over educated, Russian speaking child of Soviet immigrants. Her cohort, Twila, is a small town girl who is as abrasive as she is fearless. Together, they work to uncover a vast Cold War conspiracy and solve the mystery that made them widows in the first place.

item.title: Agile, Scrum, & Product Delivery: Practical Masterclass Demo
item.description:
Welcome to this practical masterclass demo on Agile, Scrum, and Product Delivery!
In this session, we break down theory into real-world practice, showing you exactly how modern product teams collaborate, plan, and deliver value efficiently. Whether you are an aspiring Product Owner, a Scrum Master, or a developer looking to understand the bigger picture, this demo provides actionable insights you can apply immediately.
🎯 What You'll Learn in This Demo: The Agile Mindset: Why it matters and how it shifts product development.
Scrum Framework Essentials: A look into roles, events, and artifacts.
Practical Product Delivery: Moving seamlessly from a product backlog to a shippable increment.
🕒 Timestamps (Feel free to adjust these based on your actual video timeline!)
00:00 - Introduction & Overview
02:15 - Core Principles of Agile & Scrum
05:40 - Practical Walkthrough: Managing the Backlog
10:15 - Real-World Delivery Challenges & Solutions
14:30 - Q&A and Next Steps
🚀 About RPA Vault of Trainings We specialize in delivering high-quality, practical training to help professionals master automation, agile methodologies, and modern delivery frameworks.
If you found this demo helpful, don't forget to Like, Share, and Subscribe for more practical training content!

item.title: TV Review: ‘The Boroughs’
item.description: Arriving on Netflix on May 21st with all eight episodes, ‘The Boroughs’ is set in a seemingly ideal elder community where something decidedly nasty is lurking in the walls.[sc name="tvshow" tvshow_id="Lw08WSnJvzf17JlU53MrN2" ]With ‘Stranger Things’ creators Matt and Ross Duffer as executive producers, the new show (created by Jeffrey Addiss and Will Matthews) features a cast including Alfred Molina (‘Spider-Man: No Way Home’), Geena Davis (‘Thelma & Louise’), Clarke Peters (‘The Wire’) and Denis O’Hare (‘Dallas Buyers Club').

item.title: DAX in Power BI
item.description:
DAX is what separates Power BI users from Power BI developers.
Most people can drag fields onto a canvas and call it a dashboard.
But the moment someone asks for year-over-year growth, a running total, or a metric that respects filters the way the business actually thinks - you need DAX.
And the first real test is knowing when to use a calculated column vs a measure.
Get that wrong and your model bloats, your reports slow down, and your numbers stop making sense when someone clicks a slicer.
Get it right and you stop being the person who builds reports and you become the person who builds models other people build reports on.
____________________________________________

item.title: Best Medicine
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Best Medicine.

In Best Medicine a brilliant surgeon leaves Boston to become a small-town doctor where he spent childhood summers. Despite his medical skills, his rude manner alienates locals as he battles hidden phobias and struggles with personal connections.

item.title: Widow's Bay
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Widow's Bay.

Widow's Bay is about a mysteriously cursed New England island and its superstitious citizens, led by a mayor who refuses to believe their warnings.

item.title: Margo's Got Money Troubles
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Margo's Got Money Troubles.

Margo Millet is the daughter of a Hooters waitress and an ex-pro wrestler. Now an unemployed single mother in her early 20s, Margo is struggling to make ends meet, leading her to launch an OnlyFans account. When her father reenters her life, she starts incorporating his lessons from the pro wrestling world into her OnlyFans work, leading to unexpected success.

item.title: Dutton Ranch
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Dutton Ranch.

The Dutton Ranch, home to Beth Dutton and Rip Wheeler, is a testament to the peace they sought, fought for, and nearly died for, as they've come to cherish their 7,000-acre land. With tough times and stiff competition, Beth and Rip do what they must to survive, all while ensuring Carter becomes the man he's supposed to be.

As Beth and Rip fight to build a future together - far from the ghosts of Yellowstone - they collide with brutal new realities and a ruthless rival ranch that will stop at nothing to protect its empire. In South Texas, blood runs deeper, forgiveness is fleeting, and the cost of survival might just be your soul.

item.title: Should You Take Google's AI Certificate? My Honest Take
item.description:
#sponsored AI is becoming part of how we work, create content, communicate, and solve problems every day, but knowing how to use it well is a skill on its own.
I recently took the Google AI Professional Certificate in its entirety and here’s what I really liked:
1. The Hands-on Labs where you implement AI using Google Gemini 2. The Google Instructors had great, applicable stories and delivered the content well 3. The Quizzes which give real-world scenarios
Genuinely one of the better certificates to learn AI! Try it out for yourself: https://bit.ly/4nb4VNX

item.title: From Campus to Corporate: Real-World Project Management Workshop
item.description:
🚀 From Campus to Corporate: Real-World Product Management Workshop
Step into the corporate world with confidence by understanding how real-time projects are planned, managed, and delivered in companies. This workshop is designed for students, freshers, and working professionals who want to improve their project handling and management skills.
💡 What You’ll Learn: ✔️ How real-world projects are executed ✔️ Agile & Scrum basics explained simply ✔️ Team coordination & communication strategies ✔️ Task planning, tracking & delivery process ✔️ Corporate workflow and management practices ✔️ Tips to improve career growth and professionalism
00:00 Welcome & Session Introduction 05:09 Introduction to RPA Vault Trainings 06:54 Workshop Agenda Overview 07:40 Speaker Introductions 09:35 Pramod Kumar Introduction 12:22 Raja Ram Introduction & Session Kickoff 14:56 What is Product Operating Model? 18:40 Understanding Product Management Fundamentals 23:33 L1 to L4 Product Hierarchy Explained 28:10 Real-Time Product Structure Examples 32:51 Interactive Q&A Session 35:23 Real-Time Example of L4 to L1 Structure 38:58 Handover to Pramod Kumar 39:15 Product Delivery & Execution Discussion 46:50 Security App & Customer Requirement Example 51:12 Audience Questions & Discussion 54:07 Feature Planning & Prioritization 01:04:19 Product Workflow & Approval Process 01:10:51 Epic Level Breakdown Explained 01:16:47 Open Q&A Session 01:18:05 Product Structure Clarification 01:19:25 AI Features Discussion 01:24:08 Final Questions & Closing Remarks
🎯 Perfect for students who want to bridge the gap between academics and industry expectations.
📌 Gain practical insights, industry exposure, and a better understanding of how management works in real corporate environments.
🔥 Upgrade your skills. Improve your confidence. Prepare for your corporate journey.
#ProjectManagement #CareerGrowth #CorporateSkills #Students #Agile #Scrum #RPAVault #Workshop

item.title: The Testaments
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Testaments.

The Testaments is based on Margaret Atwood's Booker Prize-winning novel of the same name, which was published in 2019 and takes place in the dystopian theocracy of Gilead. Years after the events of The Handmaid's Tale, The Testaments is a coming of age story that finds a new generation of young women in Gilead grappling with the bleak future that awaits them. For these young women, growing up in Gilead is all they have ever known, having no tangible memories of the outside world prior to their indoctrination into this life. Facing the prospect of being married off and living a life of servitude, they will be forced to search for allies, both new and old, to help in their fight for freedom and the life they deserve.

item.title: Scott Pilgrim Takes Off
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Scott Pilgrim Takes Off.

Scott Pilgrim meets the girl of his dreams, Ramona Flowers, only to find out her seven evil exes stand in the way of their love.

item.title: Memory of a Killer
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Memory of a Killer.

Memory of a Killer is a dramatic thriller about a hitman who develops early onset Alzheimer's. Angelo lives a double life as an assassin and a family man - which all worked out well until he was hit with early onset Alzheimer's. Now his worlds are colliding, putting his family in danger.

item.title: DTF St. Louis
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: DTF St. Louis.

DTF St. Louis is a darkly comedic limited series about a love triangle between three adults experiencing middle-age malaise, that leads to one of them ending up dead.

item.title: 10 Japanese Movies & Series Better Than Hollywood
item.description: Japanese TV is having a massive moment on Netflix, and for good reason. From the high-stakes survival of Alice in Borderland to the brutal action of Last Samurai Standing, , Japanese storytelling isn't just trending—it’s taking over. That’s why in this video we are counting down the 10 Best Japanese TV Shows on Netflix that belong right at the top of your watchlist. Let's dive in. 00:00 – Intro 00:22 – Alice in Borderland 01:39 – Last Samurai Standing 02:49 – The Journalist 04:03 – House of Ninjas 05:06 – Tokyo Swindlers 06:15 – The Days 07:30 – Yu Yu Hakusho 08:39 – Age of Samurai: Battle for Japan 09:49 – Giri/Haji 10:53 – Shōgun 11:55 – The Queen of Villains

item.title: Jury Duty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Jury Duty.

Jury Duty chronicles the inner workings of an American jury trial through the eyes of one particular juror, Ronald Gladden. Gladden is unaware the entire case is fake, everyone except him is an actor, including Marsden, and everything that happens — inside the courtroom and out — is carefully planned.

item.title: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord.

Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord picks up after the events of Star Wars: The Clone Wars, for a pulpy adventure that finds Maul plotting to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire. There, he crosses paths with a disillusioned young Jedi Padawan who may just be the apprentice he is seeking to aid him in his relentless pursuit for revenge.

item.title: The Madison
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Madison.

The Madison is a heartfelt study of grief and human connection following a New York City family in the Madison River valley of central Montana. It is a profound love story channeled through a deeply personal family drama about resilience and transformation. The Madison is unfolding across two distinct worlds - the beautiful landscape of Montana and the vibrant energy of Manhattan - as it examines the ties that bind families together.

item.title: Which Surgery is Best? | Laparoscopy Surgery | Open Surgery | Robotic Surgery | Dr.Ravikanth Kongara
item.description:
Which Surgery is Best? | Laparoscopy Surgery | Open Surgery | Robotic Surgery | Dr.Ravikanth Kongara --*****-- గత 12 సంవత్సరాలుగా రెండు తెలుగు రాష్ట్రాల ప్రజలకి అత్యాధునిక ప్రమాణాలతో సరికొత్త ఆధునిక వైద్య సేవలని డాక్టర్ కొంగర రవికాంత్ గారు అందిస్తున్నారు. విజయవాడలోని వారి కర్పోరేట్ స్థాయి హాస్పటల్లో తమ విశేష అనుభవంతో సామాన్యులకి కూడా అందుబాటులో ఉండే నాణ్యమైన వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తూ గొప్ప పేరు సాదించారు.
అన్ని రకాల గ్యాస్ట్రో, బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీ, లాపరోస్కోపీ సమస్యలకి చికిత్స అందిస్తూ దక్షిణ భారతదేశంలోనే నెలకు అత్యధిక బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీలు చేస్తు గొప్ప ఫలితాలు సాదించారు. అంతేగాక 200 నుండి 250 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న అత్యంత ప్రమాదకర బేరియాట్రిక్ సమస్యకి శస్త్రచికిత్స చేసి అసాధ్యాన్ని సుసాధ్యం చేసారు. సుమారు 200 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న సూపర్ ఒబేసిటీ పేషెంట్లు మంచి ఫలితాలని పొందారు.
విజయవాడలో మొట్ట మొదటిసారిగా విదేశి తరహాలో అత్యాధునిక సౌకర్యాలతో 24 గంటలు వైద్యుల పర్యావేక్షణలో వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తున్నారు. 100 పడకలతో పాటు అత్యవసర సమయంలో ఆంబులెన్స్ సౌకర్యం కలదు.
Dr. Ravikanth Kongara MBBS, MS, DNB(Gastro-NIMS) Ravi Hospital, Bariatric, gastro, laparoscopy, Swathi Press - opp Kovelamudi Street, Suryaraopeta, Vijayawada - 2, Andhra Pradesh: 520002, Phone: 0888 183 8888, 888 184 8888. https://g.co/kgs/XJHvYA
Health Disclaimer: ___________________ The information in this Video is Designed for EDUCATIONAL Purpose Only. It is not intended to be a substitute for informed medical advice or care. You Should not use this information to diagnose or treat any health problems. Please consult a doctor with any questions or concerns you might have regarding your or your child's condition.
surgery, laparoscopy, laparoscopy surgery, open surgery, robotic surgery, which surgery is best, dr ravi hospital, dr ravikanth kongara

item.description:

అన్ని రకాల గ్యాస్ట్రో, బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీ, లాపరోస్కోపీ సమస్యలకి చికిత్స అందిస్తూ దక్షిణ భారతదేశంలోనే నెలకు అత్యధిక బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీలు చేస్తు గొప్ప ఫలితాలు సాదించారు. అంతేగాక 200 నుండి 250 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న అత్యంత ప్రమాదకర బేరియాట్రిక్ సమస్యకి శస్త్రచికిత్స చేసి అసాధ్యాన్ని సుసాధ్యం చేసారు. సుమారు 200 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న సూపర్ ఒబేసిటీ పేషెంట్లు మంచి ఫలితాలని పొందారు.
విజయవాడలో మొట్ట మొదటిసారిగా విదేశి తరహాలో అత్యాధునిక సౌకర్యాలతో 24 గంటలు వైద్యుల పర్యావేక్షణలో వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తున్నారు. 100 పడకలతో పాటు అత్యవసర సమయంలో ఆంబులెన్స్ సౌకర్యం కలదు.
Dr. Ravikanth Kongara MBBS, MS, DNB(Gastro-NIMS) Ravi Hospital, Bariatric, gastro, laparoscopy, Swathi Press - opp Kovelamudi Street, Suryaraopeta, Vijayawada - 2, Andhra Pradesh: 520002, Phone: 0888 183 8888, 888 184 8888. https://g.co/kgs/XJHvYA

item.title: I Studied Gastroenterology | What Reason I Popular in Bariatric Surgery? | Dr. Ravikanth Kongara

అన్ని రకాల గ్యాస్ట్రో, బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీ, లాపరోస్కోపీ సమస్యలకి చికిత్స అందిస్తూ దక్షిణ భారతదేశంలోనే నెలకు అత్యధిక బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీలు చేస్తు గొప్ప ఫలితాలు సాదించారు. అంతేగాక 200 నుండి 250 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న అత్యంత ప్రమాదకర బేరియాట్రిక్ సమస్యకి శస్త్రచికిత్స చేసి అసాధ్యాన్ని సుసాధ్యం చేసారు. సుమారు 200 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న సూపర్ ఒబేసిటీ పేషెంట్లు మంచి ఫలితాలని పొందారు.
విజయవాడలో మొట్ట మొదటిసారిగా విదేశి తరహాలో అత్యాధునిక సౌకర్యాలతో 24 గంటలు వైద్యుల పర్యావేక్షణలో వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తున్నారు. 100 పడకలతో పాటు అత్యవసర సమయంలో ఆంబులెన్స్ సౌకర్యం కలదు.
Dr. Ravikanth Kongara MBBS, MS, DNB(Gastro-NIMS) Ravi Hospital, Bariatric, gastro, laparoscopy, Swathi Press - opp Kovelamudi Street, Suryaraopeta, Vijayawada - 2, Andhra Pradesh: 520002, Phone: 0888 183 8888, 888 184 8888. https://g.co/kgs/XJHvYA
Health Disclaimer: ___________________ The information in this Video is Designed for EDUCATIONAL Purpose Only. It is not intended to be a substitute for informed medical advice or care. You Should not use this information to diagnose or treat any health problems. Please consult a doctor with any questions or concerns you might have regarding your or your child's condition.

item.description:
Is it good to use ChatGPT for medical advice? | How to use? | Patient Story | Dr. Ravikanth Kongara --*****-- గత 12 సంవత్సరాలుగా రెండు తెలుగు రాష్ట్రాల ప్రజలకి అత్యాధునిక ప్రమాణాలతో సరికొత్త ఆధునిక వైద్య సేవలని డాక్టర్ కొంగర రవికాంత్ గారు అందిస్తున్నారు. విజయవాడలోని వారి కర్పోరేట్ స్థాయి హాస్పటల్లో తమ విశేష అనుభవంతో సామాన్యులకి కూడా అందుబాటులో ఉండే నాణ్యమైన వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తూ గొప్ప పేరు సాదించారు.
అన్ని రకాల గ్యాస్ట్రో, బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీ, లాపరోస్కోపీ సమస్యలకి చికిత్స అందిస్తూ దక్షిణ భారతదేశంలోనే నెలకు అత్యధిక బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీలు చేస్తు గొప్ప ఫలితాలు సాదించారు. అంతేగాక 200 నుండి 250 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న అత్యంత ప్రమాదకర బేరియాట్రిక్ సమస్యకి శస్త్రచికిత్స చేసి అసాధ్యాన్ని సుసాధ్యం చేసారు. సుమారు 200 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న సూపర్ ఒబేసిటీ పేషెంట్లు మంచి ఫలితాలని పొందారు.
విజయవాడలో మొట్ట మొదటిసారిగా విదేశి తరహాలో అత్యాధునిక సౌకర్యాలతో 24 గంటలు వైద్యుల పర్యావేక్షణలో వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తున్నారు. 100 పడకలతో పాటు అత్యవసర సమయంలో ఆంబులెన్స్ సౌకర్యం కలదు.

item.title: How to use Insulin Injection? | Precautions | Diabetes | Patient Story | Dr. Ravikanth Kongara
item.description:
How to use Insulin Injection? | Precautions | Diabetes | Patient Story | Dr. Ravikanth Kongara --*****-- గత 12 సంవత్సరాలుగా రెండు తెలుగు రాష్ట్రాల ప్రజలకి అత్యాధునిక ప్రమాణాలతో సరికొత్త ఆధునిక వైద్య సేవలని డాక్టర్ కొంగర రవికాంత్ గారు అందిస్తున్నారు. విజయవాడలోని వారి కర్పోరేట్ స్థాయి హాస్పటల్లో తమ విశేష అనుభవంతో సామాన్యులకి కూడా అందుబాటులో ఉండే నాణ్యమైన వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తూ గొప్ప పేరు సాదించారు.
అన్ని రకాల గ్యాస్ట్రో, బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీ, లాపరోస్కోపీ సమస్యలకి చికిత్స అందిస్తూ దక్షిణ భారతదేశంలోనే నెలకు అత్యధిక బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీలు చేస్తు గొప్ప ఫలితాలు సాదించారు. అంతేగాక 200 నుండి 250 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న అత్యంత ప్రమాదకర బేరియాట్రిక్ సమస్యకి శస్త్రచికిత్స చేసి అసాధ్యాన్ని సుసాధ్యం చేసారు. సుమారు 200 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న సూపర్ ఒబేసిటీ పేషెంట్లు మంచి ఫలితాలని పొందారు.
విజయవాడలో మొట్ట మొదటిసారిగా విదేశి తరహాలో అత్యాధునిక సౌకర్యాలతో 24 గంటలు వైద్యుల పర్యావేక్షణలో వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తున్నారు. 100 పడకలతో పాటు అత్యవసర సమయంలో ఆంబులెన్స్ సౌకర్యం కలదు.
Dr. Ravikanth Kongara MBBS, MS, DNB(Gastro-NIMS) Ravi Hospital, Bariatric, gastro, laparoscopy, Swathi Press - opp Kovelamudi Street, Suryaraopeta, Vijayawada - 2, Andhra Pradesh: 520002, Phone: 0888 183 8888, 888 184 8888. https://g.co/kgs/XJHvYA
Health Disclaimer: ___________________ The information in this Video is Designed for EDUCATIONAL Purpose Only. It is not intended to be a substitute for informed medical advice or care. You Should not use this information to diagnose or treat any health problems. Please consult a doctor with any questions or concerns you might have regarding your or your child's condition.

#insulin #diabetes #precautions #insulindose #diabetestablets #drravihospital #drravikanthkongara

Dr. Ravikanth Kongara MBBS, MS, DNB(Gastro-NIMS) Ravi Hospital, Bariatric, gastro, laparoscopy, Swathi Press - opp Kovelamudi Street, Suryaraopeta, Vijayawada - 2, Andhra Pradesh: 520002, Phone: 0888 183 8888, 888 184 8888. https://g.co/kgs/XJHvYA

What are the Important Health Checkup Should undergo after age 40 years? | Dr Ravi Kanth kongara --*****-- గత 12 సంవత్సరాలుగా రెండు తెలుగు రాష్ట్రాల ప్రజలకి అత్యాధునిక ప్రమాణాలతో సరికొత్త ఆధునిక వైద్య సేవలని డాక్టర్ కొంగర రవికాంత్ గారు అందిస్తున్నారు. విజయవాడలోని వారి కర్పోరేట్ స్థాయి హాస్పటల్లో తమ విశేష అనుభవంతో సామాన్యులకి కూడా అందుబాటులో ఉండే నాణ్యమైన వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తూ గొప్ప పేరు సాదించారు.
అన్ని రకాల గ్యాస్ట్రో, బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీ, లాపరోస్కోపీ సమస్యలకి చికిత్స అందిస్తూ దక్షిణ భారతదేశంలోనే నెలకు అత్యధిక బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీలు చేస్తు గొప్ప ఫలితాలు సాదించారు. అంతేగాక 200 నుండి 250 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న అత్యంత ప్రమాదకర బేరియాట్రిక్ సమస్యకి శస్త్రచికిత్స చేసి అసాధ్యాన్ని సుసాధ్యం చేసారు. సుమారు 200 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న సూపర్ ఒబేసిటీ పేషెంట్లు మంచి ఫలితాలని పొందారు.
విజయవాడలో మొట్ట మొదటిసారిగా విదేశి తరహాలో అత్యాధునిక సౌకర్యాలతో 24 గంటలు వైద్యుల పర్యావేక్షణలో వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తున్నారు. 100 పడకలతో పాటు అత్యవసర సమయంలో ఆంబులెన్స్ సౌకర్యం కలదు.
Dr. Ravikanth Kongara MBBS, MS, DNB(Gastro-NIMS) Ravi Hospital, Bariatric, gastro, laparoscopy, Swathi Press - opp Kovelamudi Street, Suryaraopeta, Vijayawada - 2, Andhra Pradesh: 520002, Phone: 0888 183 8888, 888 184 8888. https://g.co/kgs/XJHvYA

item.title: [mutton curry] బిర్యానీ, చపాతీ, రైస్, దేనిలోను కైనా సూపర్ టేస్టీ మటన్ గ్రేవీ కర్రీ 👌👌😋👍
పవన్ కళ్యాణ్ సార్ కి ఇష్టమైన ఫుడ్ ఏంటో తెలుసా మరి!
జంతికలు పిండిని ఇలా కలిపి చేసినట్లయితే చాలా క్రిస్పీగా టేస్టీగా వస్తాయి[crispy jantikalu recipe] 👌👍
మిక్సీ పట్టి చేసే సాఫ్ట్ స్పాంజి కేక్ ఇంట్లోనే ఎవరైనా ఈజీగా చేసుకునే కేక్ (cake recipe) 👌👌👍
